_comment_1: Phase-8 Session 4 (G2): regime → allowed strategy list. Calibrated 2026-04-22 (Audit-O) by signal-family affinity: momentum/trend families ship in trending regimes; mean-reversion in ranging; volatility in volatile; adverse silences everything. Strategy identifiers match chad.types.StrategyName values. 2026-04-22 fix: volatile expanded to include alpha_futures/delta/gamma_futures — CHAD's demonstrated-fill strategies (health >0.7, n≥7) that remain effective in volatile regimes.
_comment_2: Unknown regime keys fall through to the 'unknown' bucket. An empty list for a regime silences ALL strategies under that regime.
_comment_3: Consumed by chad.portfolio.regime_activation.filter_intents_by_regime(...) — now wired in chad.core.live_loop after _build_plan_and_intents so the matrix actually gates routed intents.
